name: @superagent/desktop
description: SuperAgent desktop app (Electron) — a Codex-inspired autonomous AI agent UI

scripts.dev: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); require('fs').copyFileSync('src/ui.html', 'dist/ui.html')" && concurrently -n "tailwind,tsc,electron" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/index.css --watch" "tsc -w" "nodemon --watch dist/main.js --watch dist/main --watch dist/gateway --watch dist/builder --exec electron dist/main.js --dev"
